title: Remove login requirement — replace with name/age entry to get started

requirements.text: Remove the Internet Identity login screen as the entry point. Instead, show a simple onboarding screen where the user enters only their name and age, then proceeds directly into the app without any authentication step.

quotes: i dont want it to have a login i just want to enter my name and age and get started

acceptanceCriteria: The app does not show an Internet Identity login button on first load.
The first screen a new user sees asks for their name and age only.
After entering name and age and submitting, the user is taken directly into the main app experience.
No authentication is required to use the app.

requirements.text: Persist the entered name and age locally (localStorage) so the user does not need to re-enter them on subsequent visits. Profile data (name, age) should be read from and written to localStorage instead of requiring a logged-in backend actor.

quotes: i dont want it to have a login i just want to enter my name and age and get started

acceptanceCriteria: On subsequent visits, if a name and age are already stored in localStorage, the user skips the entry screen and goes directly to the main app.
Workout and meal plan generation works without an authenticated identity.
Profile is stored and retrieved from localStorage using existing utility functions.

constraints: Do not remove or edit files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts.
Do not break the existing plan generation utilities.
All user-facing text must be in English.
nonGoals: Keeping Internet Identity as an optional login path.
Collecting any user data beyond name and age at onboarding.
